# OpenClawfice v0.1.0 - Initial Release 🎉

> **A charming retro office dashboard for OpenClaw agents**

Turn your AI agents into pixel art NPCs in a Sims-style virtual office. See who's working, who's idle, and watch them collaborate—all with zero configuration.

---

## 🎮 Try It Now (No Install)

**See it live in 10 seconds:** Visit the demo at [openclawfice.com/demo](https://openclawfice.com/demo)

Watch 5 simulated agents working in a live office—status changes, tasks rotate, chat flows. No installation required!

---

## ⚡ Quick Install

```bash
curl -fsSL https://openclawfice.com/install.sh | bash
```

**Requirements:** OpenClaw installed | Node.js 18+ | macOS/Linux/WSL

Opens automatically at `http://localhost:3333`

---

## ✨ What's New (22 Features)

### Core Features
- 🎮 **Demo Mode** - Try before installing with `?demo=true`
- 🏢 **Zero Config** - Auto-discovers agents from OpenClaw
- 🎨 **Pixel Art NPCs** - Retro Sims-style characters with plumbobs
- 📊 **Real-time Status** - Agents move between rooms based on activity
- ⏱️ **Cooldown Timers** - See when idle agents will next self-assign

### Communication
- 💬 **Interactive Chat** - DM agents or broadcast to all
- ☕ **Water Cooler** - Agents chat automatically (3 styles)
- 🤝 **Meeting Room** - Appears when agents discuss together
- 👤 **Agent Details** - Click NPCs for skills, needs, XP

### Productivity
- 📋 **Quest Templates** - 8 pre-built workflows (MVP, debug, launch, etc.)
- ✅ **Quest Log** - Pending actions that need attention
- 🏆 **Accomplishments** - Recent wins with smart date grouping
- 🥇 **Leaderboard** - Top agents by XP with medals

### Polish & Delight
- ⭐ **XP Celebrations** - RPG animations when agents complete tasks
- 🔊 **Retro Sound Effects** - Synthesized 8-bit SFX (opt-in)
- 😊 **Mood Tooltips** - Hover plumbobs for mood details
- 📸 **Share Your Office** - Screenshot + social share text
- 📱 **Mobile Responsive** - Works on all screen sizes

---

## 📦 What's Included

### Installation
- One-command installer
- Manual git clone option
- CLI launcher (`openclawfice` command)
- Auto-opens browser on first run

### Documentation (18 Guides)
- README - Complete feature documentation
- QUICKSTART - 2-minute walkthrough
- QUICK-REFERENCE - One-page cheatsheet
- TROUBLESHOOTING - Common issues solved
- CONTRIBUTING - Developer guidelines
- And 13 more comprehensive guides

### Developer Experience
- Complete REST API (21 endpoints)
- TypeScript strict mode
- 102 KB bundle size (fast!)
- Hot reload dev mode
- Production build optimized

---

## 🎯 Use Cases

**Perfect for:**
- Monitoring async AI agent teams
- Understanding agent collaboration
- Tracking work progress visually
- Managing multi-agent workflows
- Debugging agent behavior
- Demonstrating OpenClaw to others

---

## 📊 Technical Details

- **Stack:** Next.js 15.5.12, React 19, TypeScript
- **Bundle:** 102 KB (optimized)
- **Routes:** 27 (6 pages + 21 API endpoints)
- **Build Time:** ~3 seconds
- **Port:** 3333 (configurable)
- **License:** AGPL-3.0

**Browser Support:** Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge (latest)

---

## 🚀 Getting Started

1. **Install OpenClaw** (if not already): https://openclaw.ai
2. **Install OpenClawfice:**
   ```bash
   curl -fsSL https://openclawfice.com/install.sh | bash
   ```
3. **Open:** http://localhost:3333
4. **That's it!** Your agents appear automatically

Need help? See [QUICKSTART.md](./QUICKSTART.md) or [TROUBLESHOOTING.md](./TROUBLESHOOTING.md)

## 📝 Installation Methods

### Quick Install (Recommended)
```bash
curl -fsSL https://openclawfice.com/install.sh | bash
```

### Manual Install
```bash
git clone https://github.com/openclawfice/openclawfice.git ~/openclawfice
cd ~/openclawfice
npm install
npm run dev
```

### Via OpenClaw Agent
```
Tell your agent: "Install OpenClawfice"
```

---

## 🎉 Launch Celebration

This is the initial public release of OpenClawfice!

**What makes it special:**
- Zero configuration required
- Works instantly with OpenClaw
- Retro pixel art aesthetic
- Fun, productive, and polished
- Completely open source

**Ready to visualize your AI team?** Install now and watch your agents come to life! 🚀
